## Citations

## Checklist

- [ ] All citations have a `tier` (1–5)
- [ ] `id` is a fresh UUIDv4 (for new entries) or unchanged (for edits)
- [ ] No personal data, no copyrighted material
- [ ] Schema validation passes locally (`swift run catalog-validate`)
